description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved gemtuzumab ozogamicin in combination with daunorubicin and cytarabine for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of patients aged 15 years and above with previously untreated, de novo CD33 positive Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukemia.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: Gemtuzumab ozogamicin is indicated for combination therapy with DAUNOrubicin and cytarabine for the treatment of patients age 15 years and above with previously untreated, de novo CD33 positive Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML), except acute promyelocytic leukaemia
